Definition: used as a greeting or to begin a telephone conversation
Examples: Hello, how are you?
Hello, is anybody there?

Definition: the earth, together with all of its countries and peoples
Examples: He wants to travel around the world.
The whole world is watching.

Definition: an electronic device for storing and processing data
Examples: I work on a computer all day.
The computer crashed again.

Definition: the process of translating words or text from one language into another
Examples: The book loses something in translation.
He specializes in translation from French into English.

Definition: a piece of written, printed, or electronic matter that provides information
Examples: Please read the legal documents carefully.
Save the document before closing.

Definition: a single distinct meaningful element of speech or writing
Examples: What does this word mean?
Can I have a word with you?

Definition: the method of human communication, either spoken or written
Examples: English is a global language.
She speaks three languages fluently.

Definition: the programs and other operating information used by a computer
Examples: You need to install the software first.
The company develops educational software.

Definition: a program or piece of software designed to fulfill a particular purpose
Examples: Download the mobile application.
This application runs on Windows.

Definition: a software component that adds a specific feature to an existing computer program
Examples: Install the plugin to enable this feature.
This browser plugin blocks ads.

Definition: an activity or purpose natural to or intended for a person or thing
Examples: The function of the heart is to pump blood.
This key has a special function.

Definition: a distinctive attribute or aspect of something
Examples: The camera has many advanced features.
This is a key feature of the product.

Definition: a point where two systems, subjects, organizations, etc. meet and interact
Examples: The user interface is very intuitive.
This device has a USB interface.

Definition: a structured set of data held in a computer
Examples: Store the information in a database.
The database contains millions of records.

Definition: a group or system of interconnected people or things
Examples: The computer is connected to a network.
Social network sites are very popular.

Definition: a computer or computer program which manages access to a centralized resource or service in a network
Examples: The server is down for maintenance.
We need to upgrade our server.

Definition: a computer or program that requests data or services from another computer or program
Examples: The client connects to the server.
We need to install the client software.

Definition: a computer program with a graphical user interface for displaying HTML files
Examples: Open the website in your browser.
Which browser do you prefer?

Definition: copy (data) from one computer system to another, typically over the Internet
Examples: Download the file to your computer.
The download is complete.

Definition: transfer (data) from one computer to another, typically to one that is larger or remote
Examples: Upload your photos to the cloud.
The upload failed.
